title: Kharik Heat Wave
lead: Kharik is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.89. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kharik has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.6 GG. 
 The high temperature is accompanied by high humidity, with an Umidita of 77%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed of 8.2 km/h is not sufficient to provide any significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave.
